name: Sicilian-Style Lasagne W/Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 cup ricotta salata, pecorino romano, or parmesan cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the lasagna noodles according to package directions until al dente.
2. Prepare or heat the tomato sauce.
3. Drain the cooked lasagna noodles and transfer them to a serving bowl or platter.
4. Toss the noodles with the tomato sauce and sprinkle with grated cheese.
